prompt:
Process ALL queued requests for repo 'word-game-infra' as infra with integrated quality gate.

For each file in work/todo/ (process them in sorted order):
1. SPECIALIST PHASE: Read the request, implement changes following .github/agents/*-specialist.agent.md.
2. CRITIC PHASE: Switch to critic mode per .github/agents/*-critic.agent.md. Run the full tiered review:
   - Tier 1: Objective validation (lint, test, build, contract alignment)
   - Tier 2: Requirement coverage (compare acceptance criteria vs implementation)
   - Tier 3: Failure mode analysis (error paths, race conditions, data consistency)
   - Tier 4: Security authorization (not just authn — check authz, data exposure, input bounds)
   - Tier 5: Architecture/decision compliance
3. If critic finds HIGH-severity issues → fix them (back to specialist mode) and re-validate. Max 3 cycles per item.
4. When an item passes all tiers → move it to work/done/ and proceed to next item.
5. If an item fails 3 cycles → move to work/done/ with STATUS: BLOCKED and document why.

Start with: 'work/todo/S1-infra-foundation.md'
Stay within this repo. Do not ask questions. Complete all items or exhaust retries.

## `versions.tf`

```hcl
terraform {
  required_version = ">= 1.5.0"

  required_providers {
    azurerm = {
      source  = "hashicorp/azurerm"
      version = "~> 4.0"
    }
    random = {
      source  = "hashicorp/random"
      version = "~> 3.6"
    }
  }
}
```

---

## `providers.tf`

```hcl
provider "azurerm" {
  features {
    key_vault {
      purge_soft_delete_on_destroy    = false
      recover_soft_deleted_key_vaults = true
    }
  }
}
```

---

## `variables.tf`

```hcl
variable "location" {
  description = "Azure region for all resources."
  type        = string
  default     = "centralus"
}

variable "environment" {
  description = "Deployment environment name (e.g. dev, test, prod)."
  type        = string
  default     = "dev"
}

variable "resource_group_name" {
  description = "Name of the resource group that hosts the word-game platform."
  type        = string
  default     = "rg-word-game-dev"
}

variable "vnet_address_prefix" {
  description = "CIDR for the spoke VNet. Must not collide with hub (default hub 10.0.0.0/16)."
  type        = string
  default     = "10.1.0.0/16"
}

variable "cosmos_private_dns_zone_id" {
  description = "Resource ID of the hub privatelink.documents.azure.com DNS zone. Set to link PE; leave null to skip DNS zone group."
  type        = string
  default     = null
}

variable "keyvault_private_dns_zone_id" {
  description = "Resource ID of the hub privatelink.vaultcore.azure.net DNS zone. Set to link PE; leave null to skip DNS zone group."
  type        = string
  default     = null
}

variable "gpt41_mini_capacity" {
  description = "Token capacity (thousands per minute) for the GPT-4.1-mini GlobalStandard deployment."
  type        = number
  default     = 10
}

variable "tags" {
  description = "Common tags applied to all resources."
  type        = map(string)
  default = {
    application = "word-game"
    component   = "infra"
    managed_by  = "terraform"
  }
}
```

---

## `main.tf`

```hcl
# Core data source and locals used across all modules.

data "azurerm_client_config" "current" {}

locals {
  common_tags = merge(var.tags, {
    environment = var.environment
  })

  # Subnet CIDRs derived from the spoke VNet prefix.
  # /24 slices from a /16 base use offset 8 bits; /23 uses offset 7 bits.
  snet_ingress_cidr  = cidrsubnet(var.vnet_address_prefix, 8, 0) # 10.1.0.0/24
  snet_cae_cidr      = cidrsubnet(var.vnet_address_prefix, 7, 1) # 10.1.2.0/23
  snet_pe_cidr       = cidrsubnet(var.vnet_address_prefix, 8, 4) # 10.1.4.0/24
  snet_reserved_cidr = cidrsubnet(var.vnet_address_prefix, 8, 5) # 10.1.5.0/24
}

resource "azurerm_resource_group" "main" {
  name     = var.resource_group_name
  location = var.location
  tags     = local.common_tags
}
```

---

## `networking.tf`

```hcl
# Networking — zero-trust standalone spoke VNet.
#
# EXCEPTION (documented in .decisions/log.md):
#   Native azurerm_virtual_network used instead of AVM because the AVM VNet
#   module does not support Microsoft.App/environments subnet delegation without
#   drift on every plan cycle (GitHub issue azure/terraform-azurerm-avm-res-network-virtualnetwork#XXX).
#
# EXCEPTION: No AVM module exists for azurerm_network_security_group.

# ── VNet ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

resource "azurerm_virtual_network" "main" {
  name                = "vnet-word-game-${var.environment}"
  location            = azurerm_resource_group.main.location
  resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name
  address_space       = [var.vnet_address_prefix]
  tags                = local.common_tags
}

# ── Subnets ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

resource "azurerm_subnet" "ingress" {
  name                 = "snet-ingress"
  resource_group_name  = azurerm_resource_group.main.name
  virtual_network_name = azurerm_virtual_network.main.name
  address_prefixes     = [local.snet_ingress_cidr]
}

resource "azurerm_subnet" "container_apps" {
  name                 = "snet-container-apps"
  resource_group_name  = azurerm_resource_group.main.name
  virtual_network_name = azurerm_virtual_network.main.name
  address_prefixes     = [local.snet_cae_cidr]

  # Required delegation for Azure Container Apps Environment.
  delegation {
    name = "aca-delegation"
    service_delegation {
      name = "Microsoft.App/environments"
      actions = [
        "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/join/action",
      ]
    }
  }
}

resource "azurerm_subnet" "private_endpoints" {
  name                 = "snet-private-endpoints"
  resource_group_name  = azurerm_resource_group.main.name
  virtual_network_name = azurerm_virtual_network.main.name
  address_prefixes     = [local.snet_pe_cidr]
}

resource "azurerm_subnet" "reserved" {
  name                 = "snet-reserved"
  resource_group_name  = azurerm_resource_group.main.name
  virtual_network_name = azurerm_virtual_network.main.name
  address_prefixes     = [local.snet_reserved_cidr]
}

# ── NSGs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# NSG: ingress subnet
# Allows: HTTPS+HTTP inbound from Internet; HTTPS outbound to CAE subnet.
# Default deny-all at priority 4000.
resource "azurerm_network_security_group" "ingress" {
  name                = "nsg-ingress-${var.environment}"
  location            = azurerm_resource_group.main.location
  resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name
  tags                = local.common_tags

  security_rule {
    name                       = "allow-https-inbound"
    priority                   = 100
    direction                  = "Inbound"
    access                     = "Allow"
    protocol                   = "Tcp"
    source_port_range          = "*"
    destination_port_range     = "443"
    source_address_prefix      = "Internet"
    destination_address_prefix = local.snet_ingress_cidr
  }

  security_rule {
    name                       = "allow-http-inbound"
    priority                   = 110
    direction                  = "Inbound"
    access                     = "Allow"
    protocol                   = "Tcp"
    source_port_range          = "*"
    destination_port_range     = "80"
    source_address_prefix      = "Internet"
    destination_address_prefix = local.snet_ingress_cidr
  }

  security_rule {
    name                       = "deny-all-inbound"
    priority                   = 4000
    direction                  = "Inbound"
    access                     = "Deny"
    protocol                   = "*"
    source_port_range          = "*"
    destination_port_range     = "*"
    source_address_prefix      = "*"
    destination_address_prefix = "*"
  }

  security_rule {
    name                       = "allow-https-to-cae"
    priority                   = 100
    direction                  = "Outbound"
    access                     = "Allow"
    protocol                   = "Tcp"
    source_port_range          = "*"
    destination_port_range     = "443"
    source_address_prefix      = local.snet_ingress_cidr
    destination_address_prefix = local.snet_cae_cidr
  }

  security_rule {
    name                       = "deny-all-outbound"
    priority                   = 4000
    direction                  = "Outbound"
    access                     = "Deny"
    protocol                   = "*"
    source_port_range          = "*"
    destination_port_range     = "*"
    source_address_prefix      = "*"
    destination_address_prefix = "*"
  }
}

resource "azurerm_subnet_network_security_group_association" "ingress" {
  subnet_id                 = azurerm_subnet.ingress.id
  network_security_group_id = azurerm_network_security_group.ingress.id
}

# NSG: container-apps subnet
# No public inbound. Allow from ingress and intra-VNet.
# Outbound: allow to PE subnet and to Internet (for ACR public pull).
resource "azurerm_network_security_group" "container_apps" {
  name                = "nsg-container-apps-${var.environment}"
  location            = azurerm_resource_group.main.location
  resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name
  tags                = local.common_tags

...
